name: git-utils
description: Streamlined git workflow automation with intelligent skills. Automates common git patterns: atomic commits with semantic messages, PR merging with branch cleanup, and worktree management. Use '/commit-and-push' for quick commits or '/merge-and-cleanup' for complete PR workflows. No manual git commands needed.
longDescription:
This plugin provides high-level git workflow skills that orchestrate multiple git commands intelligently:

'/commit-and-push' Skill:
- Stages all modified and new files
- Asks for confirmation on files to exclude
- Suggests grouping into separate commits if needed
- Generates semantic commit messages (feat:, fix:, docs:, etc.)
- Pushes to origin automatically
- Follows best practices for commit hygiene

'/merge-and-cleanup' Skill:
- Merges the current PR on GitHub
- Deletes the feature branch locally and remotely
- Switches back to main/master
- Cleans up worktrees if applicable
- Provides confirmation at each step
- Handles errors gracefully

Ideal for maintaining clean git history and automating repetitive workflows.
features: Intelligent file staging with user confirmation
usageExamples: /commit-and-push - Stage, commit, and push all changes
/merge-and-cleanup - Merge PR and clean up branches
Say 'commit and push' or 'push this up' - Natural language triggers
Say 'merge this PR' - Initiates merge workflow

requiresSetup.ghCLI: GitHub CLI for PR operations: brew install gh
requiresSetup.cursorrules: Skills must be added to .cursorrules file
